name: AREthRemoveFieldFromEventgroup
title: AREthRemoveFieldFromEventgroup
syntax: long AREthRemoveFieldFromEventgroup( dword pevgHandle, dword pfHandle );
description: Removes a field created by AREthAddField from an Event Group which was created by AREthAddProvidedEventGroup. The field itself is not deleted.

parameters.name: pevgHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event Group from which a field should be removed (see AREthAddProvidedEventGroup).
